name: Presentation Design
description: Creates compelling, well-structured presentations for client meetings, pitches, status updates, and strategic recommendations that communicate clearly and build confidence.

variables.name: purpose
variables.description: Presentation type: client pitch, status update, strategic recommendation, internal briefing

variables.name: audience
variables.description: Who will see this presentation and their level of familiarity with the topic

variables.name: key_message
variables.description: The one key takeaway or action the presentation should drive

variables.name: content
variables.description: Data, strategy, or content to include in the presentation

variables.name: brand_guidelines
variables.description: Brand colors, fonts, and visual guidelines to follow

inputs.name: purpose
inputs.description: Presentation type: client pitch, status update, strategic recommendation, internal briefing

inputs.description: Who will see this presentation and their level of familiarity with the topic

inputs.name: key_message
inputs.description: The one key takeaway or action the presentation should drive

inputs.description: Data, strategy, or content to include in the presentation

inputs.name: brand_guidelines
inputs.description: Brand colors, fonts, and visual guidelines to follow
